title: Everything You Need to Know About Automated Digital Product Delivery with Crypto — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Imagine you're a digital creator in Nigeria, blocked from using PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip due to geographic restrictions or banking limitations. You've got a valuable ebook, course, or template to sell, but every payment platform you try says 'no' to you. This is a classic problem for creators with limited access to traditional payment systems, but there's a solution: automated digital product delivery with crypto.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Automated digital product delivery with crypto is a system that allows you to sell digital products online without needing a traditional payment processor like PayPal or Stripe. This is made possible by integrating cryptocurrency payment processing with a digital product delivery system. Essentially, when a customer buys a digital product, the system automatically delivers it to them upon payment, without the need for intermediaries like payment processors. This technology has many benefits, including lower fees, greater flexibility, and the ability to reach customers in restricted regions.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The Core Shop Engine, a key component of this system, serves as a full backend that manages automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. This engine works seamlessly with various payment processors, including NOWPayments, which supports over 300 cryptocurrencies. When a customer places an order, the engine automatically delivers the digital product to their inbox, while also generating a PDF receipt for their records. The entire process occurs instantly, without the need for manual intervention.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This technology is designed for digital creators who face restrictions or limitations when trying to sell their products online. Whether you're based in a restricted country, have a limited banking account, or simply want to offer your customers more payment options, automated digital product delivery with crypto is a game-changer. With this system, you can sell your ebooks, courses, templates, and other digital products without worrying about payment processor restrictions or fees.
Automated digital product delivery with crypto offers unparalleled flexibility and freedom for digital creators.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Several key components come together to power automated digital product delivery with crypto. These include the Core Shop Engine, NOWPayments, and a web wallet integration. The Core Shop Engine serves as the central hub, managing delivery, payment, and receipts. NOWPayments provides seamless cryptocurrency payment processing, while the web wallet integration enables customers to easily purchase digital products using their preferred cryptocurrencies.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To get started with automated digital product delivery with crypto, you'll need to set up your Core Shop Engine account and integrate it with NOWPayments. Next, configure your web wallet integration to enable customers to purchase digital products using their preferred cryptocurrencies. Once you've completed these steps, you're ready to start selling your digital products online, without the need for traditional payment processors.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Traditional payment processors can't compete with the low fees and high-speed transactions offered by cryptocurrency payment processing.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're searching for ways to sell digital downloads without fees, or looking for a platform to sell ebooks without PayPal, you're in the right place. The Core Shop Engine, a key component of automated digital product delivery with crypto, is the perfect solution. For example, you can try out the Core Shop Engine at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html, which is a fully functional digital download store that supports cryptocurrency payments.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with automated digital product delivery with crypto, follow these concrete steps: Set up your Core Shop Engine account and integrate it with NOWPayments. Configure your web wallet integration to enable customers to purchase digital products using their preferred cryptocurrencies. Create a digital product and configure its delivery settings within the Core Shop Engine. Test your automated delivery system to ensure it's working correctly. Finally, launch your digital product online and start selling.
By leveraging automated digital product delivery with crypto, you can reach customers in restricted regions and tap into new markets.
